prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to health visitor service delivery metrics in England, with no mention or applicability to Scotland, Wales, or Northern Ireland. Health services and their data collection frameworks can vary significantly across the UK, making this information relevant only to England.
